title: Russia bans wheat exports after crop losses
content: Moscow moves to halt wheat exports after severe crop losses, tightening global grain supply.

title: Russia extends wheat export ban as supply fears grow
content: Officials said the export ban would continue while wheat inventories remain under pressure.

title: Abqaiq attack disrupts Saudi oil output
content: A strike near Abqaiq disrupted crude output and raised concern about near-term global oil supply.

title: Saudi oil facilities hit near Abqaiq, output shaken
content: Energy markets reacted after attacks near Abqaiq damaged infrastructure and threatened crude shipments.

title: Fed signals slower cuts as inflation stays sticky
content: Federal Reserve officials suggested rates may stay higher for longer because inflation remains sticky.

title: Federal Reserve warns inflation still sticky, rate cuts delayed
content: The Fed cautioned that inflation progress remains uneven, delaying the case for near-term rate cuts.
